title: bulbostylis densa
intro: Bulbostylis densa, also known as the dense club-rush or dense bulrush, is a plant species belonging to the family Cyperaceae, commonly found in tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Bulbostylis densa include treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as being used as an antiseptic to heal wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas or infusions, and can also be made into a poultice or ointment to apply topically.
